name: Code Optimizer
description: Iteratively improve code quality through autonomous test-score-refine loops combining deterministic verifiers with LLM-judged criteria.
longDescription:
Combines **deterministic verifiers** (test runner, linter, type-checker, formatter) with **LLM-judged criteria** (naming clarity, function complexity, error handling, duplication, module structure) in a unified scoring harness.

Auto-detects project tooling (`eslint`, `pytest`, `tsc`, `cargo clippy`, etc.) and establishes baselines. Deterministic checks act as **hard constraints** — any change that breaks passing tests or increases lint errors is auto-reverted regardless of LLM score improvements.

Each round: run all verifiers, score LLM criteria, pick weakest area, make one fix, re-score, keep or revert. Includes live `dashboard.html` with score chart and changelog. Supports full, audit-only, focused, and re-score modes.
